scripts.build: npm run build -w @openslin/shared && npm run build -w @openslin/api && npm run build -w @openslin/worker && npm run build -w @openslin/device-agent && npm run build -w @openslin/runner && npm run build -w @openslin/admin-cli && npm run build -w @openslin/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @openslin/api && npm run test -w @openslin/device-agent && npm run test -w @openslin/web && npm run test -w @openslin/worker && npm run test -w @openslin/shared
scripts.verify:arch07: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test
